pre_game.message: Hey D, I'm C and I'm really pumped about this Simco game—I heard it's a chance to win some serious cash. What's your story, how'd you end up here?

Hey C, nice to meet you! I'm D, and I heard about this Simco game through a buddy who won some cash before—figured it was worth a shot to help out my family. I'm stoked about the potential too. How about you, what's got you so pumped?
Oh, totally, D—I'm pumped because I heard about this Simco game as a real chance to win money and support my family and friends, and I'm all in to make it happen!
That's great to hear, C—I'm with you on making this count for our loved ones; let's team up and crush it, what's one thing you're most excited about in the game?
Oh, totally, D—I'm most excited about the strategy and teamwork in the game, like figuring out how to play smart together to grab that big win for our families!
Yeah, C, I'm right there with you—strategy and teamwork could be our edge, especially since I've got some experience from past games; what's one strategy tip you think we should try?
Oh, totally, D, one strategy tip I think we should try is to communicate our moves early and build trust, so we can coordinate without leaving anyone out and boost our chances for everyone!

Absolutely, C, communicating early and building trust sounds smart—I love that idea; in my past games, it made all the difference, so let's put it into practice—what's a good way you think we can kick off that communication right away?
Oh, totally, D, let's kick off by quickly sharing our top goals for the game with everyone in the room right now, so we can spot overlaps and start coordinating!
Yeah, C, that's a solid plan—let's share with the group; my top goal is to play strategically and win enough to support my family, so we can all benefit from this!
Oh, totally, D, that's awesome—my top goal is the same, winning big to support my family and friends, so let's make it happen with the group!
